requirement_topic.en: Japan Market Access — Diamond PSE Mark, METI Business Notification, JET/JQA Conformity and Recycling Obligations
requirement_topic.zh: 日本市场准入——菱形PSE标志、METI事业申报、JET/JQA合格评定及回收义务
requirement_topic.zht: 日本市場准入——菱形PSE標誌、METI事業申報、JET/JQA合格評定及回收義務

summary.en: Non-Japanese manufacturers placing portable lithium secondary batteries or power banks on the Japanese market must fulfil the following market access obligations: (1) Diamond PSE mark — for in-scope lithium-ion secondary batteries (Specified Electrical Appliances), conformity must be assessed by a Registered Conformity Assessment Body (e.g., JET or JQA), and the diamond PSE mark affixed after certification. (2) Business notification (事業届出) — the importer or domestic manufacturer must file a business notification with METI before placing products on the market, and must be a Japan-established notifying business operator (届出事業者) who carries the legal responsibility (a foreign maker typically works through a Japanese importer/operator). (3) Conformity records — the operator must conduct and retain the required conformity inspections. (4) Recycling — under the Act on the Promotion of Effective Utilization of Resources (資源有効利用促進法), small rechargeable batteries (including lithium-ion) are designated for recycling, and producers participate in the JBRC collection scheme; in-store collection and the recycling mark may apply. The round PSE mark applies only to Non-specified appliances via self-declaration and does not cover the diamond-PSE lithium-ion secondary battery category.
summary.zh: 非日本制造商将便携式锂二次电池或移动电源投放日本市场，须履行以下市场准入义务：（1）菱形PSE标志——对于范围内锂离子二次电池（特定电气用品），须由登录检查机构（如JET或JQA）评定符合性，认证后粘贴菱形PSE标志。（2）事业申报（事業届出）——进口商或国内制造商须在投放市场前向METI进行事业申报，且须为在日本设立、承担法律责任的届出事业者（外国制造商通常通过日本进口商/运营商进行）。（3）符合性记录——运营商须进行并保存所需的符合性检查。（4）回收——依据资源有效利用促进法（資源有効利用促進法），小型可充电电池（含锂离子）被指定为回收对象，生产者参与JBRC回收方案；店内回收及回收标志可能适用。圆形PSE标志仅适用于经自我声明的非特定电气用品，不覆盖菱形PSE的锂离子二次电池类别。
summary.zht: 非日本製造商將便攜式鋰二次電池或行動電源投放日本市場，須履行以下市場准入義務：（1）菱形PSE標誌——對於範圍內鋰離子二次電池（特定電氣用品），須由登錄檢查機構（如JET或JQA）評定符合性，認證後粘貼菱形PSE標誌。（2）事業申報（事業届出）——進口商或國內製造商須在投放市場前向METI進行事業申報，且須為在日本設立、承擔法律責任的届出事業者（外國製造商通常透過日本進口商/運營商進行）。（3）符合性記錄——運營商須進行並保存所需的符合性檢查。（4）回收——依據資源有效利用促進法（資源有効利用促進法），小型可充電電池（含鋰離子）被指定為回收對象，生產者參與JBRC回收方案；店內回收及回收標誌可能適用。圓形PSE標誌僅適用於經自我聲明的非特定電氣用品，不覆蓋菱形PSE的鋰離子二次電池類別。

standards_or_laws: Electrical Appliances and Materials Safety Act (DENAN) — diamond PSE mark via Registered Conformity Assessment Body; round PSE for Non-specified appliances via self-declaration
DENAN Act business notification (事業届出) to METI — notifying business operator obligations
Act on the Promotion of Effective Utilization of Resources (資源有効利用促進法) — small rechargeable battery recycling (JBRC scheme)
Registered Conformity Assessment Body certification — e.g., JET, JQA (METI-registered)

summary.en: China's domestic market access for lithium battery products uses a different framework: CCC (China Compulsory Certification, administered by CNCA/SAMR) is mandatory for certain rechargeable battery product categories sold domestically (e.g., mobile phone lithium batteries are CCC-listed). However, CCC certification is a Chinese domestic market requirement and is NOT recognised by Japan; it does not substitute for the PSE mark. Chinese manufacturers do not need to appoint a Japanese notifying business operator for domestic Chinese sales. There is no Chinese equivalent of Japan's METI business notification or JBRC recycling participation obligation for exporters. WEEE-style obligations have no direct Chinese counterpart in the Japanese sense; China has the Regulations on the Administration of the Recovery and Disposal of Waste Electrical and Electronic Products (废弃电器电子产品回收处理管理条例) for domestic use.
summary.zh: 中国国内锂电池产品市场准入采用不同框架：CCC（中国强制认证，由CNCA/SAMR管理）对某些在国内销售的可充电电池产品类别为强制性（如手机锂电池已列入CCC目录）。然而，CCC认证属于中国国内市场要求，不被日本认可，不可替代PSE标志。中国制造商在国内销售时无需任命日本届出事业者。对于出口商，中国没有等同于日本METI事业申报或JBRC回收参与义务的对应制度。日本意义上的回收义务在中国无直接对应制度；中国在国内实行《废弃电器电子产品回收处理管理条例》。
summary.zht: 中國國內鋰電池產品市場准入採用不同框架：CCC（中國強制認證，由CNCA/SAMR管理）對某些在國內銷售的可充電電池產品類別為強制性（如手機鋰電池已列入CCC目錄）。然而，CCC認證屬於中國國內市場要求，不被日本認可，不可替代PSE標誌。中國製造商在國內銷售時無需任命日本届出事業者。對於出口商，中國沒有等同於日本METI事業申報或JBRC回收參與義務的對應制度。日本意義上的回收義務在中國無直接對應制度；中國在國內實行《廢棄電器電子產品回收處理管理條例》。

standards_or_laws: CCC — China Compulsory Certification (CNCA/SAMR) — domestic China market access only; not recognised in Japan
PRC Regulations on the Administration of the Recovery and Disposal of Waste Electrical and Electronic Products (2011, amended 2019) — domestic recycling equivalent

gap.en: Chinese manufacturers exporting portable lithium batteries to Japan face four structural market access gaps with no Chinese domestic equivalent: (1) the diamond PSE mark obtained through third-party conformity assessment by a Registered Conformity Assessment Body (e.g., JET or JQA) before market placement — self-declaration (round PSE) is not available for in-scope lithium-ion secondary batteries; (2) a Japan-established notifying business operator (届出事業者) must file the METI business notification and carry legal responsibility — a foreign maker typically must work through a Japanese importer or operator; (3) retained conformity inspection records under the DENAN Act; (4) participation in the JBRC small rechargeable battery recycling scheme under the Resource Effective Utilization Act, with recycling marking. CCC certification (Chinese domestic) is not transferable. Total compliance cost may include Registered Conformity Assessment Body certification fees, importer/operator arrangement, and recycling-scheme participation.
gap.zh: 向日本出口便携式锂电池的中国制造商面临四项在中国国内无对应制度的结构性市场准入差距：（1）投放市场前须经登录检查机构（如JET或JQA）第三方合格评定取得菱形PSE标志——范围内锂离子二次电池不可采用自我声明（圆形PSE）；（2）须有在日本设立的届出事业者进行METI事业申报并承担法律责任——外国制造商通常须通过日本进口商或运营商进行；（3）依据电气用品安全法（DENAN）保存符合性检查记录；（4）依据资源有效利用促进法参与JBRC小型可充电电池回收方案，并进行回收标注。CCC认证（中国国内）不可转移。合规总成本可能包括登录检查机构认证费、进口商/运营商安排及回收方案参与费用。
gap.zht: 向日本出口便攜式鋰電池的中國製造商面臨四項在中國國內無對應制度的結構性市場准入差距：（1）投放市場前須經登錄檢查機構（如JET或JQA）第三方合格評定取得菱形PSE標誌——範圍內鋰離子二次電池不可採用自我聲明（圓形PSE）；（2）須有在日本設立的届出事業者進行METI事業申報並承擔法律責任——外國製造商通常須透過日本進口商或運營商進行；（3）依據電氣用品安全法（DENAN）保存符合性檢查記錄；（4）依據資源有效利用促進法參與JBRC小型可充電電池回收方案，並進行回收標註。CCC認證（中國國內）不可轉移。合規總成本可能包括登錄檢查機構認證費、進口商/運營商安排及回收方案參與費用。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory legal obligation — the diamond PSE mark via a Registered Conformity Assessment Body, a Japan-established notifying business operator with METI business notification, and retained conformity records apply before market placement; JBRC small rechargeable battery recycling participation is required under the Resource Effective Utilization Act
mandatory_status.cn: CCC certification mandatory for domestically-sold products in applicable categories; no equivalent of Japan's notifying business operator, METI business notification, or JBRC recycling participation required of Chinese exporters under Chinese law

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Chinese portable lithium battery and power bank exporters must address four market access obligations before Japanese market entry: the diamond PSE mark via a Registered Conformity Assessment Body (e.g., JET or JQA), a Japan-established notifying business operator filing the METI business notification, retained conformity inspection records under the DENAN Act, and JBRC small rechargeable battery recycling participation. The round PSE self-declaration route does not cover in-scope lithium-ion secondary batteries. CCC certification does not transfer to or substitute for any of these Japanese requirements.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 中国便携式锂电池及移动电源出口商在进入日本市场前，须应对四项市场准入义务：经登录检查机构（如JET或JQA）取得菱形PSE标志、由在日本设立的届出事业者进行METI事业申报、依据电气用品安全法（DENAN）保存符合性检查记录，以及参与JBRC小型可充电电池回收。圆形PSE自我声明路径不覆盖范围内锂离子二次电池。CCC认证无法转移或替代上述任何日本要求。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 中國便攜式鋰電池及行動電源出口商在進入日本市場前，須應對四項市場准入義務：經登錄檢查機構（如JET或JQA）取得菱形PSE標誌、由在日本設立的届出事業者進行METI事業申報、依據電氣用品安全法（DENAN）保存符合性檢查記錄，以及參與JBRC小型可充電電池回收。圓形PSE自我聲明路徑不覆蓋範圍內鋰離子二次電池。CCC認證無法轉移或替代上述任何日本要求。

source.publisher: Ministry of Economy, Trade and Industry (METI) — Electrical Appliances and Materials Safety Act (DENAN) market access
